description: Style NoteStylish and sweet without looking overtly grown-up, this pair is perfect for the teen who likes to stay abreast of the latest fashion trends. This pair is just right for the latest season's style with pastel shades dominating the ensemble!Product DetailsBlack sandal with criss-cross straps at the forefoot, strap running across the midfoot and a strap at the backfoot with a buckle closurePadded footbed with brandingTextured outsole with a heelSizeHeel: 2& rdquo Material and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
